Services

What I bring to a brand.

From first sketch to final application — a single point of contact for identity, advertising and motion.

01

Brand Identity

Strategy-led naming support, logo systems, colour and type architecture built to hold up across every touchpoint.

02

Logo Design

Marks that carry meaning — researched, sketched and refined until one idea earns its place.

03

Advertising Design

Concept-first campaigns for print, outdoor and digital that say one thing clearly and memorably.

04

Motion Graphics

Identity in motion — logo animation, social motion assets and short-form campaign edits.

05

Visual Communication

Editorial layouts, packaging systems and environmental design that keep a brand's language consistent.

06

Social Media Design

Scroll-stopping templates and campaign creative built around a brand's actual voice.

Est. Design Practice
Pune, India
Studio

Brand thinking before brand styling.

I'm Herambh Kumar — a brand identity, logo and visual communication designer. My work sits at the point where a business's strategy has to become something people can actually see, recognise and trust.

Every project on this site started as a genuine problem: an NGO that needed a visual language rooted in Indian culture, an agrotech brand that needed to feel scientific rather than decorative, a legacy dairy cooperative that needed to modernise without losing four decades of trust. The design decisions follow from the problem — not the other way round.

I work across brand identity, logo design, advertising and motion, which means a client gets one coherent visual system instead of a patchwork of vendors.
